subcodes.first_line: O Kamálu'd-Dín! Bear thou witness within thine own self that verily there is no God but Him, the Originator, the Wondrous. Say: He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کمال الدین ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو المبدع البدیع قل انه
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
